name: @limrun/cli
description: Use remote XCode, iOS Simulator, Android Emulator and more to build and test apps from Linux, Windows or macOS.

ios.description: Execute any task on remote iOS Simulators: create, list, get, delete, info, list-apps, launch-app, terminate-app, log, build, sync, screenshot, tap, tap-element, element-tree, type, press-key, scroll, open-url, install-app, record, perform

android.description: Execute any task on remote Android Emulators: create, list, get, delete, connect, screenshot, tap, tap-element, element-tree, type, press-key, scroll, open-url, install-app, record

xcode.description: Execute any task on remote XCode sandboxes: create, list, get, delete, sync, build

asset.description: Upload, download, list, inspect, and delete files that can be used by iOS & Android as pre-installed apps: push, pull, list, delete

session.description: Manage persistent background sessions for device interaction: start, status, stop. Sessions are used to execute commands on remote devices without the need to reconnect to the device after each command.
